subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Word of God! Purity and sanctification are the very foundations of God's Faith and the greatest means of attainment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بکلمه الله طهارت و تقدیس از اس اساس دین الهی است و اعظم وسیله وصول
subcodes.subjects: @cleanliness and refinement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
